name: edit_cron_job
description: Edit an existing scheduled task (cron job). Change the prompt, schedule, delivery method, or other settings. Cron jobs run server-side via the /chat path; the interactive/device-bound providers (agents, gemini-agents, realtime, local) are OUT of cron scope and not selectable here.

job_id.description: The ID of the cron job to edit

model.description: A provider word (gemini/openai/claude/grok/computer-use) for that provider's default, OR a specific model id from GET /models/{provider}. Empty = the provider's configured default (Auto). Use 'computer-use' for tasks needing desktop/browser/GUI interaction.

provider.description: Which provider routes this job: one of gemini, openai, claude, grok, computer-use. Optional; if omitted it is derived from the model. The interactive/device-bound providers (agents, gemini-agents, realtime, local) are OUT of cron scope.

delivery_target.description: New phone number for SMS/voice delivery

pause.description: Set to true to pause the job, false to resume it. Can be combined with field changes in the same call.

one_shot.description: Whether the job runs once then auto-deletes

operator.description: Reassign the job to a different operator
